# Codex Mission Package Template

Create a mission package as a folder under `codex/inbox/`.

Recommended package structure:

```text
MISSION_ID/
    README.md
    MISSION.md
    CODEX.md
    ACCEPTANCE.md
```

## README.md

Human-readable package summary.

## MISSION.md

Official mission statement, objective, scope, allowed files, prohibited files and governance constraints.

## CODEX.md

Execution instructions specific to Codex.

## ACCEPTANCE.md

Acceptance criteria and required validation commands.

## Reports Generated By Codex

On success:

```text
EXECUTION_REPORT.md
```

On failure:

```text
ERROR_REPORT.md
```
